languages.text: {n}Джай прикрывает рот рукой, подавляя зевок. Во второй ее руке белеет несколько талонов.{/n} "Вам, мудрейший, когда-нибудь говорили, что у вас чудотворный голос? Крепкий здоровый сон в очереди и правда позволяет прожить ее быстрее!"

{n}Holding a few white tickets in one hand, Jae covers her mouth with the other, suppressing a yawn.{/n} "Has anyone ever told you, O wisest of men, that your voice is miraculous? A deep, sound sleep really does make the queue move faster."
languages.original_text: {n}Джай прикрывает рот рукой, подавляя зевок. Во второй ее руке белеет несколько талонов.{/n} "Вам, мудрейший, когда-нибудь говорили, что у вас чудотворный голос? Крепкий здоровый сон в очереди и правда позволяет прожить ее быстрее!"

traits.locale_text: "O-o-oh!" {n}Holding a few white cards in her hand, Jae covers her mouth with the other, suppressing a yawn.{/n} "Has anyone ever told you, O wisest of men, that your voice is miraculous? A deep, sound sleep in a queue really does make it go faster. Or, at the very least, lets you finally catch up on your rest."

"O-o-oh!" {n}Holding a few white cards in her hand, Jae covers her mouth with the other, suppressing a yawn.{/n} "Has anyone ever told you, O wisest of men, that your voice is miraculous? A deep, sound sleep in a queue really does make it go faster. Or, at the very least, lets you finally catch up on your rest."

{n}Holding a few white tickets in one hand, Jae covers her mouth with the other, suppressing a yawn.{/n} "Has anyone ever told you, O wisest of men, that your voice is miraculous? A deep, sound sleep really does make the queue move faster."

{n}Holding a few white tickets in one hand, Jae covers her mouth with the other, suppressing a yawn.{/n} "Has anyone ever told you, O wisest of men, that your voice is miraculous? A deep, sound sleep really does make the queue move faster."

languages.text: {n}Jae se lleva una mano a la boca para tapar un bostezo mientras sujeta con la otra varios números blancos.{/n} «¿Le ha dicho alguien, oh, sabio entre los sabios, que su voz es prodigiosa? Desde luego, un buen sueño ayuda a acelerar la cola».
languages.original_text: {n}Holding a few white tickets in one hand, Jae covers her mouth with the other, suppressing a yawn.{/n} "Has anyone ever told you, O wisest of men, that your voice is miraculous? A deep, sound sleep really does make the queue move faster."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jae se lleva una mano a la boca para tapar un bostezo mientras sujeta con la otra varios números blancos.{/n} «¿Le ha dicho alguien, oh, sabio entre los sabios, que su voz es prodigiosa? Desde luego, un buen sueño ayuda a acelerar la cola».

languages.text: {n}婕伊一手攥着几张白色票券，另一手捂着嘴，强忍着哈欠。{/n}“世间最睿智之人啊，有没有人告诉过你，你的嗓音简直就是奇迹？沉沉地睡上一觉，确实会让排队时间变快很多。”
languages.original_text: {n}Holding a few white tickets in one hand, Jae covers her mouth with the other, suppressing a yawn.{/n} "Has anyone ever told you, O wisest of men, that your voice is miraculous? A deep, sound sleep really does make the queue move faster."

traits.locale_text: {n}婕伊一手攥着几张白色票券，另一手捂着嘴，强忍着哈欠。{/n}“世间最睿智之人啊，有没有人告诉过你，你的嗓音简直就是奇迹？沉沉地睡上一觉，确实会让排队时间变快很多。”

languages.text: {n}Mit einigen weißen Tickets in der einen Hand unterdrückt Jae mit der anderen ein Gähnen.{/n} "Hat Euch schon jemand gesagt, dass Ihr eine wunderbare Stimme habt, weisester aller Männer? Nach einem geruhsamen Schlaf bewegt sich die Schlange wirklich schneller."
languages.original_text: {n}Holding a few white tickets in one hand, Jae covers her mouth with the other, suppressing a yawn.{/n} "Has anyone ever told you, O wisest of men, that your voice is miraculous? A deep, sound sleep really does make the queue move faster."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einigen weißen Tickets in der einen Hand unterdrückt Jae mit der anderen ein Gähnen.{/n} "Hat Euch schon jemand gesagt, dass Ihr eine wunderbare Stimme habt, weisester aller Männer? Nach einem geruhsamen Schlaf bewegt sich die Schlange wirklich schneller."

languages.text: {n}Une poignée de tickets blancs dans une main, Jae se couvre la bouche de l'autre pour réprimer un bâillement.{/n} « On vous a déjà dit que votre voix faisait des miracles, ô savant homme ? Rien de tel qu'un profond sommeil réparateur pour faire avancer la queue plus vite. »
languages.original_text: {n}Holding a few white tickets in one hand, Jae covers her mouth with the other, suppressing a yawn.{/n} "Has anyone ever told you, O wisest of men, that your voice is miraculous? A deep, sound sleep really does make the queue move faster."

traits.locale_text: {n}Une poignée de tickets blancs dans une main, Jae se couvre la bouche de l'autre pour réprimer un bâillement.{/n} « On vous a déjà dit que votre voix faisait des miracles, ô savant homme ? Rien de tel qu'un profond sommeil réparateur pour faire avancer la queue plus vite. »

languages.text: {n}Bir elinde birkaç beyaz bilet tutan Jae, diğer eliyle ağzını kapatarak esnemesini bastırıyor.{/n} "Sana daha önce sesinin mucizevi olduğunu söyleyen olmuş muydu ey insanların en bilgesi? Derin ve sağlıklı bir uyku, kuyruğun gerçekten daha hızlı ilerlemesini sağlıyor."
languages.original_text: {n}Holding a few white tickets in one hand, Jae covers her mouth with the other, suppressing a yawn.{/n} "Has anyone ever told you, O wisest of men, that your voice is miraculous? A deep, sound sleep really does make the queue move faster."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir elinde birkaç beyaz bilet tutan Jae, diğer eliyle ağzını kapatarak esnemesini bastırıyor.{/n} "Sana daha önce sesinin mucizevi olduğunu söyleyen olmuş muydu ey insanların en bilgesi? Derin ve sağlıklı bir uyku, kuyruğun gerçekten daha hızlı ilerlemesini sağlıyor."

languages.text: ジェは白いチケットを握り、もう片方の手で口を覆い、あくびを堪えている。 「あなたの声は奇跡的だと、あなたに言われたことはありますか？ 深い眠りから覚めると、列が早く進むのです。」
languages.original_text: {n}Holding a few white tickets in one hand, Jae covers her mouth with the other, suppressing a yawn.{/n} "Has anyone ever told you, O wisest of men, that your voice is miraculous? A deep, sound sleep really does make the queue move faster."

traits.locale_text: ジェは白いチケットを握り、もう片方の手で口を覆い、あくびを堪えている。 「あなたの声は奇跡的だと、あなたに言われたことはありますか？ 深い眠りから覚めると、列が早く進むのです。」
